title: Iraq’s New Leader Faces Resistance Trying to Bring Militias Under State Control
summary_full: The Trump administration has demanded that Iraqi leaders distance themselves from Iran and rein in Iran-linked militias that are outside of government control.
summary_public: The Trump administration has demanded that Iraqi leaders distance themselves from Iran and rein in Iran-linked militias that are outside of government control.
